name: paytm
description: Paytm Payment Gateway integration skills bundle - one-time payments, subscriptions, payment links, dynamic QR, webhooks, refunds, and troubleshooting. Loaded modularly per intent.

skills.name: getting-started
skills.description: First-step setup: MID/Merchant Key, environments, .env conventions, decision tree for picking the right Paytm flow.

skills.name: js-checkout
skills.description: One-time payment via JS Checkout: Generate Checksum -> Initiate Transaction -> Render -> Callback -> Transaction Status.

references.summary: JS Checkout deep dive: full callback fields, non-SDK form POST, event lifecycle, corp-proxy TLS.

skills.name: subscriptions
skills.description: UPI Autopay / Native Subscription for recurring charges (mandates, monthly / weekly / yearly, SIPs).

references.summary: Subscription full field reference, error code table, charge/edit/cancel flows.

skills.name: payment-links
skills.description: Server-only payment link flow - returns a shortUrl shared via SMS / WhatsApp / email. No frontend needed.

references.summary: Payment link 20+ pitfalls, MID quirks, error code table, fetch-transaction reconciliation.

skills.name: qr-codes
skills.description: Dynamic QR for in-store / counter / printed payments. Server creates QR, customer scans with any UPI app.

references.summary: QR reconciliation flow, posId rules, base64 prefix gotcha.

skills.name: webhooks
skills.description: S2S webhook receiver - source of truth that outlives lost browser callbacks. Event types, raw body, signature verify, dedup, retry behavior.

references.summary: Webhook event types, retry/backoff schedule, raw-body extraction per language, dedup patterns, security checklist.

skills.name: refunds
skills.description: Full and partial refunds via /refund/apply and /refund/status, refund webhooks, partial-refund cumulative limit, PENDING state and dispute relationship.

references.summary: Full refund API surface, state lifecycle, error codes table, settlement impact, dispute relationship, idempotency patterns.

skills.name: all-in-one-sdk
skills.description: Paytm All-in-One SDK for native Android/iOS - turn-key mobile checkout with Paytm-branded UI. Same backend flow as JS Checkout (Initiate Transaction -> txnToken), SDK renders payment screens.

references.summary: Callback fields, event lifecycle (Android/iOS), deep-link & scheme registration, SDK error codes, subscription consent on mobile.

skills.name: custom-sdk
skills.description: Paytm Custom SDK for native Android/iOS - headless SDK where merchant builds their own payment UI. fetchPaymentOptions + processTransaction. PCI scope for cards.

references.summary: Per-instrument request shapes (Card / UPI / Net Banking / EMI), PCI scope reality, 3DS WebView gotchas per bank, UPI polling pattern, fetchPaymentOptions response shape.

skills.name: troubleshooting
skills.description: Symptom -> cause -> fix tree, expanded RESPCODE reference, corp-proxy TLS interception guidance.

references.summary: Full troubleshooting reference: per-symptom fixes, corp-proxy TLS deep dive, expanded RESPCODE table.

targets.name: Claude.ai (Projects)
targets.notes: Upload skill files manually as project files.

targets.name: Codex (CLI or ChatGPT desktop)
targets.notes: Both Codex CLI and the ChatGPT desktop app read from ~/.codex/skills/.

targets.name: Antigravity
targets.notes: No stable filesystem skills convention yet.
